meaning: n.叶尼塞河(西伯利亚中部河流)
examples: The Yenisei River starts in Mongolia and flows through Russia to the Kara Sea in the Arctic Ocean. It's 3,445 miles long.
The Rivers Ob and Yenisei flow into the Arctic Ocean from the Altai and Sayan Mountains.
Mr. MAX HOLMES (Climate Scientist): Essentially, the Ob, Yenisei and Lena are all comparable in size to the Mississippi.
Holmes spends a lot of time in Siberia measuring freshwater rolling into the Arctic Ocean from rivers like the Ob, the Yenisei and the Lena, rivers most Americans have never heard of.
